---
title: "Robin Kilshaw"
subtitle: "Doctoral Student"
description: "University of Utah, Clinical Psychology"
image: avatar.jpg
group: alumni
order: 1
toc: false
---

::: {.profile-header}
![](avatar.jpg)


:::

## About

Former MaRSS Lab honours student. Winner of the Canadian Psychological Association’s Honours Thesis Certificate of Excellence.


## Contact

- {{< fa brands google-scholar >}} [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=WpD2M6MAAAAJ&hl=en)
- {{< fa globe >}} [University of Utah](https://psych.utah.edu/people/graduate-students/kilshaw-robyn.php)
